title: Easy Dye Cutter 🪚
description: 🪚 Craft any dye variant directly in the Stonecutter!
body:
**🎨 Easy Dye Cutter**

Tired of hunting specific flowers just to get the dye color you need?

Easy Dye Cutter lets you convert dyes in the stonecutter using a Bottle of Dye.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ Features**

✅ Craft a Bottle of Dye from any flower

✅ Works with modded flowers

✅ Works with modded glass

✅ Convert dyes easily inside the stonecutter

✅ Simple, vanilla-friendly mechanic

✅ Perfect for builders & modpacks

![recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0b799652cf14c4e1aa1273bfe7687fe05f08bb93.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🧪 How it works**

Craft a Bottle of Dye

Put it in the stonecutter

Choose the dye color you want

Done 🎉

No more biome hunting.

![cutter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a82999422c2dfbd80a919fa89fbaf54f16612511.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
